raw_text: I bought eggs and a bottle cleaning kit. Had I seen these products in an offline store, I would never have purchased them. The egg packaging was already opened, making the quality of the eggs doubtful. Also, the bottle cleaning brush is too large to clean bottles and seems more suitable for cleaning buckets. So very poor experience just wastage of money since you can't use the product you bought it for. good bye blinket, feeling cheated

Blinkit is my go-to app for daily grocery needs. I order my Amul milk, curd, and butter every morning, and they always arrive fresh and perfectly chilled within 10 minutes. The interface is super smooth and delivery is incredibly fast. Highly recommended!
3+ orders placed for the same products due to app malfunction, unable to reach the customer support. Time consuming and mental stress. simply irritating.

they are looting the people by delivering the damaged or local copy products of brands and most of the time they don't replace the items and their customer care support is very bad u can't contact them easily and the blinkit turns off the chat support from their end so you can't complain about your issues.

very good service editing this after 6 months of using the app. still I would accept that the service is very good and 24x7. Products are fresh and good quality Just one request in our area pin 700144 , most of the time in evening they take a surcharge. We would be grateful if this can be taken care of

Your services r good. Only that Handling charges that you are applying on every order. it's too much. You might already be earning so much from all the orders that you get. but you still are charging Handling fees ₹12/- per order. it's not acceptable.

worst service, Delivery charges are high and no proper customer service. Agents doesn't know the details to be shared if customer is having an issue with the order. Once agent marked as completed. customer can't cancel it. the worst ever experience

some items are relatively expensive, good factor they are delivered round the clock. had very bad experience on electronics items bought. shows 7 days return policy but their help center rep denied of any such possibility and suggested to reach band service which I am not aware of. sounds absurd. beware before You buy. do not expect any assistance from their end.

Hello Blinkit team, There are many people in our area who would love to use Blinkit, but unfortunately the service is not available here yet. Quick delivery services are really useful for groceries, medicines, and daily essentials, especially during emergencies. We request you to consider expanding Blinkit to our area soon. It would definitely be appreciated by a lot of residents here. Thank you!

a great app for all things delivered in minutes. but just a request that if possible blinkit should add should add items of low cost also for example chocolate of 10 rupees or ice cream 10 rupees the items are available but at 20 or 30 rupees. overall it's a great app

huge thanks to the Blinkit team and delivery partner for delivering my order at 3 AM. It really helped at an important time.tried Swiggy, Zepto, and other apps, but nobody was delivering at 3 AM. Blinkit was the only one available and delivered on time. Really thankful to the team and delivery partner for being there at midnight. Great service!

very bad experience i order cake on July 2026 for my brother. I paid online via gpay but they don't deliver the product and showing product got delivered. worst thing is after so many follow ups and after almost one week no refund is done by these guys. worst experience with blinkit.

Poor customer support. Can't even connect to chat with customer service. If we mailed our issue not even getting solution. I complaint about missing item they are telling that eveything was there as per my order & rejected my concern. Very poor shopping app i ever used. Iam using bigbasket, instamart & jio mart, didn't experienced this from them.

So many extra charges on 2/3 delivery. it's not fair. It's not fair. for me D Mart is near to buy, instead of giving you so many extra amount on one delivery better to go and buy in reasonable price. my suggestion is if you will do like this very soon your service will close like Bigbasket in our area. I am regular costomer of yours so think on that.

Your doctor call from your unit was very harash. You need to be careful who the person on other line to behave and be polite on call. First of all he was not a doctor, was a call center guy as there was no manners in his speaking to the ordering party. This is my 3rd experience with Blinkit orders. Bad exoeriece. Another bad experience it is a call center, as it goes on answering machine. The best option is to remove this items. as for me Zepto during emergency is the best option.

⭐ 1 Star Extremely concerning experience with Blinkit. I ordered Swisse Men's Multivitamin and received a bottle with no visible expiry date. Assuming it was a one-time error, I returned it and ordered the same product again. Shockingly, the replacement also had no visible expiry information. Health supplements are consumed daily, and customers have a right to verify expiry details before use. This raises serious concerns about quality control, product safety, and customer trust.

Many a times when one's order not delivered; when some part of the order not delivered; when something wrongly delivered and when one cancel the order; the Blinkit never ever refunds one's money! no satisfactory responses; no customer care; nothing nice in this regard ever there with theBlinkit! very difficult and disgusting!!😔😏
I give 1 star rating why there is customer support when you can't solve the customer's problem and saying it's your fault not the product's my problem was genuine but they can't solve it.

It's wonderful to have blinkit, which delivers orders so fast and has made life easier. it runs smoothly and works for last minute orders as well.... thank you blinkit. I use it almost every alternate day. most of my orders are from this app....

the timing of delivery is perfect, delivery is also fast according to app in 10 minutes and taste of edible product is good . you must try this aap for ordering item. but sometimes it takes more than 10 minutes according to product
